testsuite.name: google search with consent form - page objects

testcase.name: should find nightwatch.js in results
testcase.classname: google search with consent form - page objects

failure.message: Timed out while waiting for element <input[value="Google Search"]> to be visible for 1000 milliseconds. - expected "visible" but got: "not visible" (1069ms)

error.message: Timed out while waiting for element <input[value="Google Search"]> to be visible for 1000 milliseconds. - expected [32m"visible"[39m but got: [31m"not visible"[39m [90m(1069ms)[39m
